announcements.title: Current project focus: workable public demos
announcements.summary: The current project goal/focus is to build workable demos for the public.
announcements.agent_expectation: Every agent working on the project should keep public-demo readiness in mind and surface concrete demo proposals when relevant.
guidance: Prefer proposals that identify the demo surface, owner repo, minimum viable user flow, validation command, and blockers.
Treat this as advisory focus, not automatic approval to mutate nested repos or promote canon.
Use existing demo-readiness, Mission Control, and operator-snapshot reports as evidence before claiming demo readiness.
announcements.owner_surface: root control-plane repo plus explicitly named demo owner repos
